case_title: BELL, KARLA et al VS JOHNSON, DIANNA

docket_entries.description: PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELL, KARLA SANDERS, INGA PETITION MAILED ON MAR 12, 2007
(CLAIM IS ABOUT AN ATTORNEY-CLIENT FEE DISPUTE)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELL, KARLA SANDERS, INGA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DIANNA $6,375.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,480.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2007, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DIANNA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELL, KARLA SANDERS, INGA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DIANNA $6,375.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,480.00, PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $100.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON (DATE) FEBRUARY 01, 2007 AND ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
